name: Aputure STORM 1000c BLAIR-CG LED Monolight with Wide Reflector
description: Expanding Aputure's line of BLAIR-CG LED chipset lights, the STORM 1000c BLAIR-CG LED Monolight with Wide Reflector is a versatile point-source workhorse offering exceptional brightness while maintaining extremely high color accuracy.

features.General Features: For Studio & Film/TV Production | Output: 14,200 Lux at 9.8' w/ Reflector | 1800-20,000K CCT; BLAIR-CG Color Control | 1000W Color-Tunable Point-Source Unit | Onboard, DMX, Sidus & App Control | Art-Net, sACN & LumenRadio CRMX Control | SSI (D56) 86 | SSI (Tungsten) 88 | Smart, High, Medium & Silent Fan Modes | Bowens ProLock Mount | IP65 Weather Resistance
